creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
avl         2009-07-02 23:16:55 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia           Makefile 
  Added files:
    multimedia/arista    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    multimedia/arista/files patch-arista-gtk 
  Log:
  An easy to use multimedia transcoder for the GNOME Desktop.
  Arista focuses on being easy to use by making the complex task of
  encoding for various devices simple. Pick your input, pick your target
  device, choose a file to save to and go.
  
  WWW:    http://programmer-art.org/projects/arista-transcoder
  
  PR:             ports/136014
  Submitted by:   Steve Wills <steve at mouf.net>
  Approved by:    tabthorpe (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.327     +1 -0      ports/multimedia/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/multimedia/arista/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/multimedia/arista/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +15 -0     ports/multimedia/arista/files/patch-arista-gtk (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/multimedia/arista/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +65 -0     ports/multimedia/arista/pkg-plist (new)
